refined_caption: The hospital waiting room is overcrowded with multiple patients waiting. There appears to be a lack of available seating.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital today and was shocked to see how crowded the waiting room was. There were not enough seats for all the patients, and many were left standing or sitting on the floor. This is not only uncomfortable but also unsanitary.
voice_text: The waiting room is super crowded, there's nowhere to sit. It's really uncomfortable and doesn't feel very clean.
